text.autoconfig.fast_log.title: Fast LOG Settings
text.autoconfig.fast_log.option.commandT: The command that will be sent to the server.
text.autoconfig.fast_log.option.delayTic: 20 ticks = 1 second. Wait time before execution. Set it to 40 if there is a high ping or delay.
text.autoconfig.fast_log.option.hideFrom: Messages with this phrase will move to Action Bar.
text.autoconfig.fast_log.option.checkBli: Only trigger if player has blindness effect.
text.autoconfig.fast_log.option.allowedI: List of servers where the mod is active.
